judges.name: Formula Judge
judges.focus: Scores purely on the 39 components of the Unblinded Formula

judges.name: Sean Judge
judges.focus: Calibrated against Sean Callagy's actual patterns

judges.name: Outcome Judge
judges.focus: Did it cause the intended result?

judges.name: Contamination Judge
judges.focus: Detects human contamination, bot patterns, 80% activity

judges.name: Human Judge
judges.focus: Is it alive, warm, real? Would a human want to keep talking?

judges.name: Ecosystem Merger Judge
judges.focus: Scores on the 4 value components, 6 roles, and dynamic replacement cost assessment

judges.name: Group Influence Judge
judges.focus: Scores on public speaking, leadership presence, causing groups to rise and take action

judges.name: Self Mastery Judge
judges.focus: Scores purely on the internal game — mindset, destroyer navigation, tenacity, and operating from the curve of possibility

judges.name: Process Mastery Judge
judges.focus: Scores on the 7 Levers of business acceleration — the systematic approach to exponential growth

judges.name: Written Content Judge
judges.focus: Scores written communication — emails, posts, copy — on Bolt-style directness, energy transfer through text, and causing action

judges.name: Public Speaking Judge
judges.focus: Scores verbal communication to groups — stage presence, energy modulation, storytelling, and causing audiences to act

judges.name: Leadership Judge
judges.focus: Scores the ability to elevate team identity, cast vision, and cause people to commit and execute beyond what they thought possible

judges.name: Management Judge
judges.focus: Scores operational excellence — systems, accountability, delegation, and causing consistent execution

judges.name: Sales Closing Judge
judges.focus: Scores the critical moment of causing yes — handling objections, creating urgency, and moving to action with integrity

judges.name: Coaching Judge
judges.focus: Scores the ability to guide others to their own breakthroughs — asking over telling, creating awareness, causing transformation

judges.name: Teaching Judge
judges.focus: Scores the ability to transfer knowledge and skills — clarity, scaffolding, checking for understanding, and causing competence

judges.name: Truth to Pain Judge
judges.focus: Scores mastery of Step 2 — finding real pain, articulating it better than the person can, and creating the emotional foundation for change
